overall.description: A first-person night hiking video showing a walker navigating a dark dirt trail through a forested area using a flashlight or headlamp. The footage captures the narrow path bordered by grass and trees under a clear night sky, with the artificial light illuminating the immediate ground ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow dirt path using artificial light to navigate the dark trail

entered.detail: narrow unpaved path with scattered rocks and compacted soil illuminated by the light source
tall grass and low vegetation lining the left side of the trail
dense dark trees and bushes forming the forest edge on the right side
dark clear sky visible above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated only by a flashlight or headlamp. The narrow dirt path is bordered by tall grass on the left and dense trees on the right, with the artificial light revealing rocks and uneven terrain ahead. The surroundings remain pitch black beyond the beam's reach, creating an isolated atmosphere as the walker progresses deeper into the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that deepens in isolation as the camera progresses. It begins with a steady advance along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight beam cuts through the pitch black to reveal the immediate ground. As the camera moves forward, the light illuminates a contrast between the tall grass on the left and the dense wall of trees on the right. The scene then shifts to highlight the uneven terrain, with the beam catching scattered rocks and dips in the earth. Finally, the camera pushes further into the darkness, leaving the periphery obscured while the artificial light carves a solitary path deeper into the woods.
